mano_cua.result_summary: 虚拟滚动快速上下滚动时视口出现完全空白区域。复现步骤：先scroll down 500+然后立即scroll up 50+，视口内容完全消失，仅剩左侧导航栏和空白内容区。小幅滚动（5-20 clicks）可恢复内容。空白区域不仅出现在文档顶部边界，也出现在文档中间位置。根因：virtual-top-height占位元素未正确定位渲染缓冲区，快速滚动时预渲染buffer无法覆盖视口位置
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Virtual Top-Height Placeholder Misalignment: When a rapid large scroll moves the viewport position, the virtual scroll's top-height spacer fails to correctly position the rendered content within the viewport. The viewport scroll position lands between the end of one render buffer and the start of the next. Pre-render Buffer Gap: The virtual scroll's pre-render buffer is not large enough to cover rapid long-distance scrolls.
